global_description: Medium-sized mammal with a rounded body covered in sharp quills, typically brown or gray. It has a small head, short legs, and a bushy tail. The quills are long, stiff, and pointed, providing defense against predators.

part_details.head: Small with dark eyes and a short snout
part_details.body: Rounded with dense coverage of sharp quills
part_details.quills: Long, stiff, pointed, brown or gray
